title: clerodendrum yakusimense
intro: Clerodendrum yakusimense, a species of flowering plant in the family Lamiaceae, is also known as Yakushima glorybower or Yakushima pleated glorybower. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum yakusimense include potential uses in treating fever, colds, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic properties. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human consumption.
